script_text: What does the -s at the end of cats mean?
One cat. Two cats. The S means more than one!
Running, jumping, playing. All happening now!
The last two letters are e-d. That means it already happened.
What is the root word in playing?
Take off the -ing. What is left?
Add -ed to walk. What word do you get?
Walk plus e-d means you already did it!
